questions.text: Who parted the Red Sea so the Israelites could cross?
questions.explanation: Moses, with God's help, parted the Red Sea so the Israelites could escape from Egypt.

questions.text: What was the sign of the covenant between God and Noah?
questions.explanation: God placed a rainbow in the sky as a sign of His covenant with Noah.

questions.text: Which book comes immediately after Genesis?
questions.explanation: Exodus is the second book of the Old Testament, following Genesis.

questions.text: Which book contains many wise proverbs attributed to Solomon?
questions.explanation: The book of Proverbs contains wisdom largely attributed to Solomon.

questions.text: Which prophet is known for his vision of God's throne?
questions.explanation: Ezekiel saw a vision of God's throne with living creatures and wheels.

questions.text: Which prophet said: 'For unto us a child is born, unto us a son is given'?
questions.explanation: Isaiah prophesied the birth of the Messiah in Isaiah 9:6.

questions.explanation: The book of Proverbs contains wisdom largely attributed to Solomon.

questions.text: Which prophet is known for his vision of God's throne?
questions.explanation: Ezekiel saw a vision of God's throne with living creatures and wheels.

questions.text: Which prophet said: 'For unto us a child is born, unto us a son is given'?
questions.explanation: Isaiah prophesied the birth of the Messiah in Isaiah 9:6.
